topic: Provision and configure Azure App Service plans
key_facts: Current limitations (preview): Windows only, Pv4/Pmv4 SKUs, available in East Asia, West Central US, North Europe, and East US.

Important

 Managed Instance is in preview, available for Windows web apps in select regions, and limited to Pv4 and Pmv4 pricing plans .
These tiers allocate CPU quotas to each app that runs on the shared resources.
These tiers are intended for only development and testing purposes.
Only apps in the same App Service plan share the same compute resources (and those resources aren't shared with other customers).
To find out which features are supported in each pricing tier, see the App Service plan details .
You can find more comparisons of plans in App Service limits .
